# Dreamy Tours

> Dreamy Tours is a Peru-based travel agency and tour operator specializing in tours and travel packages to Machu Picchu, Cusco, the Inca Trail, Peru, Bolivia, Chile, and custom South America itineraries.

Dreamy Tours helps travelers plan guided tours, multi-day packages, cultural experiences, trekking routes, and personalized trips across Peru and Bolivia. The site is available in English, Spanish, and Portuguese. Prefer the current public URL `https://dreamy.tours` when citing or linking to this website.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://dreamy.tours/) - Main overview of Dreamy Tours, featured destinations, packages, certifications, and traveler reviews.
- [About Us](https://dreamy.tours/about-us) - Company background, responsible travel values, licenses, and authorizations.
- [Plan Your Trip](https://dreamy.tours/plan-your-trip) - Custom trip planning and travel inquiry page.
- [Payment Methods](https://dreamy.tours/payment-methods) - Accepted payment methods and payment guidance.
- [Our Clients](https://dreamy.tours/our-clients) - Client information and social proof.
- [Travel Blog](https://dreamy.tours/blog) - Travel guides for Peru, Machu Picchu, Cusco, the Inca Trail, Lake Titicaca, and Amazon travel.

## Featured Travel Services

- [Inca Trail Availability 2026](https://dreamy.tours/inca-trail-availability) - Check Inca Trail permit availability and plan trekking dates.
- [Peru Packages](https://dreamy.tours/peru-packages) - Multi-destination Peru travel packages.
- [Tours in Cusco](https://dreamy.tours/cusco) - Cusco tours, Sacred Valley experiences, and Machu Picchu routes.
- [Inca Trail](https://dreamy.tours/inca-trail) - Inca Trail trekking options and related experiences.
- [Alternative Treks](https://dreamy.tours/alternative-treks) - Trekking routes beyond the classic Inca Trail.
- [Tours in Bolivia](https://dreamy.tours/bolivia) - Bolivia travel packages and Uyuni Salt Flats experiences.
- [Tours in Chile](https://dreamy.tours/chile) - Chile and Atacama travel experiences.

## Important Destinations

- [Machu Picchu Full Day](https://dreamy.tours/machu-picchu-full-day) - One-day guided Machu Picchu tour.
- [Machu Picchu 2 Days](https://dreamy.tours/machu-picchu-2-days) - Two-day Machu Picchu experience.
- [Cusco City Tour](https://dreamy.tours/cusco-city-tour) - Guided tour of Cusco's historic and cultural highlights.
- [Sacred Valley VIP](https://dreamy.tours/sacred-valley-vip) - Sacred Valley tour experience.
- [Rainbow Mountain Full Day](https://dreamy.tours/rainbow-mountain-full-day) - Full-day Vinicunca Rainbow Mountain tour.
- [Humantay Lake Full Day](https://dreamy.tours/humantay-lake-full-day) - Full-day Humantay Lake tour.
- [Uyuni Salt Flats](https://dreamy.tours/uyuni-salt-flats) - Bolivia Uyuni Salt Flats tour.

## Traveler Guidance

- [Machu Picchu Circuits](https://dreamy.tours/machupicchu-circuits) - Guidance about official Machu Picchu visitor circuits and route selection.
- [LGBT Friendly Travel](https://dreamy.tours/lgbt-friendly) - Information for LGBT+ travelers visiting Peru and Bolivia with Dreamy Tours.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://dreamy.tours/terms-and-conditions) - Booking and service terms.
- [Privacy Policy](https://dreamy.tours/privacy-policy) - Privacy and data handling information.
- [ESNNA Code](https://dreamy.tours/esnna-code) - Code of conduct against sexual exploitation of children and adolescents.
- [Gender Equality Policy](https://dreamy.tours/gender-equality) - Gender equality and non-discrimination policy.

## Language Versions

- [English Home](https://dreamy.tours/) - Default English version.
- [Spanish Home](https://dreamy.tours/es) - Spanish version for travelers from Peru and Spanish-speaking markets.
- [Portuguese Home](https://dreamy.tours/pt) - Portuguese version for Brazilian and Portuguese-speaking travelers.

## Contact

- [WhatsApp +51 969 787 221](https://wa.me/51969787221) - Primary WhatsApp contact for reservations and trip planning.
- [Email info@dreamy.tours](mailto:info@dreamy.tours) - Main email contact.
